description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages (test-python, build-docs, pypi) and a postgres service, defining POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER and POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables. In the test-python stage add three unit‑test jobs (python3_10_unit_test, python3_11_unit_test, python3_12_unit_test) that each use the matching python:<version>-slim-bullseye image, run apt‑get update && apt‑get install -y git, export PYTHONPATH, pip install -r requirements_test.txt, then execute coverage run runtests.py, coverage report -m and coverage html, and store the htmlcov/ directory as an artifact. In the build-docs stage add a pages job that runs only on tags, uses the seriallab/python3.6dev image, installs git via apt‑get, sets PYTHONPATH, installs the test requirements and sphinx‑related packages with pip, runs make docs, moves docs/_build/html/ to a public/ folder, and publishes public/ as a pages artifact that expires in one day. In the pypi stage add a deploy_pypi job that also runs only on tags, uses the same seriallab/python3.6dev image, writes a .pypirc file with the PYPI_USER and PYPI_PASSWORD variables, runs python setup.py check sdist bdist_wheel upload, then removes the .pypirc file, and is associated with a deployment environment named deployment pointing to https://pypi.org/. All jobs inherit the postgres service for any database needs.
